capability: Inventory world-space UI presentation and interaction

required_checks.purpose: Prove the digested build installs on the selected profile
required_checks.expected: The tested artifact installs without substituting another build.

required_checks.purpose: Reach the declared package composition in the headset
required_checks.expected: The world-space Inventory sample opens and displays its declared composition.

required_checks.purpose: Bind the observation window to a reproducible human test posture and minimum duration
required_checks.expected: The tester uses the posture recorded in the receipt and continuously exercises the composition for at least 120 seconds.

required_checks.purpose: Reject unintended head-locked UI
required_checks.expected: The UI remains at its recorded world pose while the tester turns their head left, right, up, and down.

required_checks.purpose: Prove spatial anchoring under positional movement
required_checks.expected: The UI preserves its recorded world pose while the tester leans laterally in both directions.

required_checks.purpose: Evaluate headset readability at the recorded placement
required_checks.expected: Representative labels, quantities, and state text are readable binocularly at the recorded distance.

required_checks.purpose: Record whether physical scale supports the complete Inventory surface
required_checks.expected: The complete surface fits at a usable physical scale without requiring unintended head-locked resizing.

required_checks.purpose: Record whether panel angle preserves legibility and target acquisition
required_checks.expected: The recorded panel angle keeps representative text and left, center, and right targets legible and selectable.

required_checks.purpose: Prove both tracked controllers can acquire the complete interaction surface
required_checks.expected: Both recorded controllers can comfortably acquire the left, center, and right targets from the recorded posture.

required_checks.purpose: Detect scene geometry or UI layers that hide required content or targets
required_checks.expected: Required text, states, and targets are not materially occluded or clipped throughout the recorded posture and head movement.

required_checks.purpose: Capture comfort over the complete minimum observation window
required_checks.expected: The recorded placement, scale, angle, and reach cause no immediate discomfort during the full duration recorded in the receipt.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller hover on the left target
required_checks.expected: The left controller produces a stable hover state on the left target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller hover on the center target
required_checks.expected: The left controller produces a stable hover state on the center target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller hover on the right target
required_checks.expected: The left controller produces a stable hover state on the right target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller hover on the left target
required_checks.expected: The right controller produces a stable hover state on the left target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller hover on the center target
required_checks.expected: The right controller produces a stable hover state on the center target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller hover on the right target
required_checks.expected: The right controller produces a stable hover state on the right target without activating it.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller activation on the left target
required_checks.expected: The left controller activates the left target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller activation on the center target
required_checks.expected: The left controller activates the center target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove left-controller activation on the right target
required_checks.expected: The left controller activates the right target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller activation on the left target
required_checks.expected: The right controller activates the left target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller activation on the center target
required_checks.expected: The right controller activates the center target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove right-controller activation on the right target
required_checks.expected: The right controller activates the right target exactly once and records the expected domain intent.

required_checks.purpose: Reject multi-target hover or activation leakage from the left controller
required_checks.expected: For each left, center, and right acquisition, only the intended target changes hover/pressed state and emits an intent.

required_checks.purpose: Reject multi-target hover or activation leakage from the right controller
required_checks.expected: For each left, center, and right acquisition, only the intended target changes hover/pressed state and emits an intent.

required_checks.purpose: Prove disabled controls cannot mutate Inventory through the left controller
required_checks.expected: Hovering and activating a disabled target with the left controller emits no domain intent and leaves Inventory state and revision unchanged.

required_checks.purpose: Prove disabled controls cannot mutate Inventory through the right controller
required_checks.expected: Hovering and activating a disabled target with the right controller emits no domain intent and leaves Inventory state and revision unchanged.

required_checks.purpose: Verify renderer projection of neutral UI states
required_checks.expected: Hover, pressed, selected, disabled, empty, and error states remain distinguishable where applicable.

required_checks.purpose: Exercise the profile's declared recovery path
required_checks.expected: Restart or recenter preserves a usable UI/input composition according to the task.

optional_checks.purpose: Collect evidence for direct poke without inheriting a controller-ray result
optional_checks.expected: Representative targets can be hovered and activated by direct poke with correct state feedback.

optional_checks.purpose: Collect evidence for hand-ray interaction independently
optional_checks.expected: Representative targets can be acquired and activated by the recorded hand-ray route.

optional_checks.purpose: Collect evidence for gaze and pinch independently
optional_checks.expected: Representative targets can be focused and activated by gaze and pinch with correct state feedback.

non_claims: Passing one package composition does not prove the sibling renderer or XR adapter
Passing one device profile, operating-system version, runtime, or input route does not prove another
Passing one resolved dependency lock or build tuple does not prove another version, target, graphics API, scripting backend, or architecture
An execution shorter than 120 seconds or without a recorded allowed posture cannot support the required suite
Editor, simulator, screenshot, or source inspection cannot satisfy required headset checks
Optional capability claims require their own passed check and an input route admitted by the device profile
